error_signature: no results returned from the query
title: Postgres query parameters not returning results
symptom: When using query parameters in a Postgres node, no results are returned, while the full SQL query works fine.
applies_when: Setting query parameters in the edit fields node
not_this_if: Full SQL query works without parameters
root_cause: The issue arises from incorrectly formatted query parameters. Specifically, adding quotes around parameter values in the set node can lead to the Postgres node not recognizing them correctly, resulting in no results being returned.
fix_steps: Open the set node where you define the query parameters
Remove any quotes around the parameter values
In the Postgres node, directly link the parameter instead of using the parameter option
Save the workflow and execute it again
agent_instruction: Remove quotes from the parameter values in the set node and link them directly in the Postgres node.
